title: OrangeWhitelist
description: A safe, modern and customizable plugin of Whitelist
body:
![OrangeWhitelist Banner](https://imgur.com/Tuwa86G.png) # **OrangeWhitelist** ### *A safe, modern and customizable plugin of Whitelist* [![Maintained by FruitForge Studios](https://img.shields.io/badge/Maintained%20by-FruitForge%20Studios-4da6ff?style=for-the-badge)](https://fruitforge.com/discord) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1332150488753246310?color=7289da&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://fruitforge.com/discord)
--- ## **Why Choose OrangeWhitelist?** OrangeWhitelist is a relatively new, highly secure, sophisticated, and highly customizable plugin that allows you to implement a **strong Whitelist system** to protect your server while it is under maintenance or if it is private. It includes **bans and kicks** upon detecting a Whitelist violation.
### 📖 **[FULL DOCUMENTATION HERE](https://docs.fruitforge.com/)** 📖
## **✨ Core Features** ### **🔒 Security Features** - **Robust Whitelist System** - Implement strong protection for your server - **Not Case-Sensitive** - Prevents name spoofing attacks - **Bedrock Support** - Full compatibility with Geyser players - **LiteBans Integration** - Advanced ban system support - **Discord Commands** - Manage whitelist from Discord ### **🎨 Customization** - **MiniMessage Format** - Modern text styling with HEX colors - **Fully Customizable** - Configure messages, kick reasons, and more - **Lightweight & Modern** - Optimized performance with clean code - **Secure Architecture** - Built with security best practices ## **📋 Commands & Permissions** ### **Commands:** ``` /orangewl enable ➜ Enables the Whitelist /orangewl disable ➜ Disables the Whitelist /orangewl add ➜ Adds a player to the Whitelist /orangewl remove ➜ Removes a player from the Whitelist /orangewl reload ➜ Reloads the configuration ``` ### **Permissions:** ``` orangewhitelist.set ➜ Enable/Disable whitelist orangewhitelist.manage ➜ Add/Remove players orangewhitelist.reload ➜ Reload configuration orangewhitelist.bypass ➜ Bypass The Whitelist (SENSIBLE - Deactivable) orangewhitelist.antiremove ➜ They wont be able to take you out of Whitelist (Deactivable) orangewhitelist.admin ➜ All permissions ``` ## **📦 Requirements & Compatibility** ### **Dependencies:** - LiteBans **(Optional)** ### **Supported Versions:** - Minecraft 1.8.8 - 1.21.8 - Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish ## **🚀 Coming Soon** - ✓ Bungee Support - ✓ Velocity Support - ✓ Essentials Ban/Kick Hook - ✓ AdvancedBans Ban/Kick Hook - ✓ LibertyBans Ban/Kick Hook ## **🎬 Live Demonstrations**
📺 View Demo ![Demo](https://imgur.com/234Lo0L.png)
